objective: identify potential php object injection vulnerabilities and discover possible POP gadget chains leading to remote code execution
analysis_tasks: scan codebase for unserialize entry points
detect methods that interact with file operations or command execution
trace property access inside magic methods
identify if attacker-controlled properties can reach dangerous sinks
attempt to construct possible POP gadget chains
wordpress_context_checks: check if serialized data is stored in options or metadata
check if unserialize is applied to user-controlled input
check if plugin loads external serialized data
